formulas.label: eq0015
formulas.latex: S := \left\{the set of stations in the railway network\right\} L := \left\{the set of lines in the railway network\right\} := \left\{l = \left\{s_{1} , \ldots , s_{k}\right\} : s_{i} \in S \land \left\{s_{1} , \ldots , s_{k}\right\} is a path in the railway network\right\} V := \left\{the set of nodes of the network\right\} := \left\{\left(s , l\right) \in S \times L : s \in l\right\}

formulas.label: eq0020
formulas.latex: A := A_{\mathit{train}} \cup A_{\mathit{cor}} A_{\mathit{train}} := \left\{\left(\left(s , l\right) , \left(s^{'} , l\right)\right) : track of line l from station s to the adjacent station s^{'}\right\} A_{\mathit{cor}} := \left\{\left(\left(s , l\right) , \left(s , l^{'}\right)\right) : \left(represent the passengers\right)^{'} connection at station s between l and l^{'}\right\}

                                          </mml:mrow>
                                       </mml:msup>
                                    </mml:mrow>
                                    <mml:mo stretchy="true">}</mml:mo>
                                 </mml:math>

<mml:math xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns="http://www.elsevier.com/xml/ja/dtd" xmlns:xoe="http://www.elsevier.com/xml/xoe/dtd" xmlns:bk="http://www.elsevier.com/xml/bk/dtd" xmlns:cals="http://www.elsevier.com/xml/common/cals/dtd" xmlns:ce="http://www.elsevier.com/xml/common/dtd" xmlns:ja="http://www.elsevier.com/xml/ja/dtd" xmlns:sa="http://www.elsevier.com/xml/common/struct-aff/dtd" xmlns:sb="http://www.elsevier.com/xml/common/struct-bib/dtd" xmlns:tb="http://www.elsevier.com/xml/common/table/dtd" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink" xmlns:xocs="http://www.elsevier.com/xml/xocs/dtd" xmlns:dc="http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/" xmlns:dcterms="http://purl.org/dc/terms/" xmlns:prism="http://prismstandard.org/namespaces/basic/2.0/" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" altimg="si0024.gif" overflow="scroll">

                                    </mml:mrow>

formulas.latex: \left(\frac{\partial P_{L} \left(t\right)}{\partial t} \left|\right.\right)_{\alpha_{L , d} \left(t\right) , \alpha_{L} \left(t\right)} = \frac{\frac{\partial C_{L} \left(t\right)}{\partial t} \cdot \left(C_{L} \left(t\right) - \alpha_{L} \left(t\right)\right) - \frac{\partial C_{L} \left(t\right)}{\partial t} \cdot \left(\right. C_{L} \left(t\right) - \alpha_{L , d} \left(t\right)}{\left(C_{L} \left(t\right) - \alpha_{L} \left(t\right)\right)^{2}} = \frac{\partial C_{L} \left(t\right)}{\partial t} \cdot \frac{\alpha_{L , d} \left(t\right) - \alpha_{L} \left(t\right)}{\left(C_{L} \left(t\right) - \alpha_{L} \left(t\right)\right)^{2}}
